word: H6335 - פּוּשׁ - pûwsh - poosh - Grow up

sections.paragraph:
Original: פּוּשׁ

Transliteration: pûsh

Phonetic: poosh

BDB Definition:

  1. to spring about
    1. (Qal) to frisk, act proudly (figuratively)
  2. (Niphal) to be scattered, be spread

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1751,1752

Part(s) of speech: Verb
